transformed_query: WITH pts AS (SELECT t.dimension_code AS ticker, m.dimension_code AS metric, dp.time, dp.value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dp.series_id ORDER BY dp.time DESC) AS rn, dp.series_id FROM data_points AS dp JOIN dimensions AS t ON t.series_id = dp.series_id AND t.dimension_type = 'ticker' AND t.dimension_code IN ('ETN', 'ROK', 'GE', 'EMR', 'WAB', 'TT', 'GLW', 'FAST', 'WCC', 'VRT', 'HON', 'JCI', 'CMI', 'PCAR', 'DE', 'OTIS', 'CARR', 'COHR', 'FN', 'LITE', 'AME', 'WTS', 'FLS', 'CR', 'ITT', 'LII', 'DHR', 'IR', 'IEX', 'CAT', 'ALLE', 'AMAT', 'KLAC', 'RTX', 'HWM', 'TDG', 'WWD') JOIN dimensions AS m ON m.series_id = dp.series_id AND m.dimension_type = 'metric_code' AND m.dimension_code IN ('operating_income', 'dep_amortization', 'net_income', 'interest_expense', 'operating_cash_flow', 'capex') WHERE dp.series_id IN (SELECT series_id FROM series WHERE series_id LIKE '%consolidated_quarterly') AND dp.time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 MONTHS') SELECT ticker, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'operating_income' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_ebit, COUNT(CASE WHEN metric = 'operating_income' AND rn <= 4 THEN 1 END) AS n_ebit_q, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'dep_amortization' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_da, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'net_income' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_ni, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'interest_expense' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_int, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'operating_cash_flow' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_ocf, SUM(CASE WHEN metric = 'capex' AND rn <= 4 THEN value END) AS ltm_capex, MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'operating_income' THEN time END) AS latest_q FROM pts GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY ticker
note: Showing 36 of 37 rows. To use the rest, aggregate or compute it in SQL — e.g. GROUP BY date_trunc('month', time), or a SUM/AVG/rank/ratio — and return that. Do NOT try to pull the raw rows: large results don't fit in context and aren't needed for a chart or a summary. (To window a single series, get_series takes from_year/to_year.)
